title: Vercel v0 vs Claude Code: When to Use Which in Frontend Teams
abstract: A stage-by-stage guide for choosing Vercel v0 or Claude Code in frontend workflows, from UI discovery to production-ready implementation.
meta-title: Vercel v0 vs Claude Code: When to Use Which in Frontend Teams
meta-description: Understand the difference between Vercel v0 and Claude Code for frontend teams. Learn where each tool fits and how to combine them for faster shipping.
